headers.title: GOLDMETRICS - The Ultimate Vehicle Tracking Solution
headers.description: GOLDMETRICS is a cutting-edge vehicle tracking system designed to provide real-time location monitoring, advanced security features, and seamless integration for both personal and commercial use.

heroSection.slogan: The new era of intelligent vehicule security and management with God's Tracker.

mission.title: Mission
mission.content: Our mission is to transform vehicle safety through an intelligent monitoring system and advanced telemetry, allowing our target segments to regain absolute control of their units in real time. We are committed to protecting the assets of our users and enhancing the profitability of their assets, eliminating uncertainty through immediate responses and personalized analytics that turn each vehicle into a protected and efficient entity.

vision.title: Vision
vision.content: Our vision is to consolidate ourselves as the leading platform in vehicle security and intelligent asset management through telemetry and IoT, raising the standard of protection against technical crime. Likewise, we aspire for each vehicle connected to GuardiAnts to operate as an intelligent and autonomous system capable of anticipating risks, detecting interference, activating safeguard protocols and keeping the owner or administrator always in control from anywhere. With our product we seek to build a reliable, secure and highly available ecosystem that not only increases recovery and theft prevention, but also drives more efficient and profitable mobility for people and companies by converting data into fast, clear and actionable decisions in real time.

benefits.title: Benefits
benefits.benefit1: Manage your fleet with ease: GUARDIANTS provides a user-friendly interface that allows you to monitor and manage your vehicles effortlessly, saving you time and resources.
benefits.benefit2: Enhanced Security: GUARDIANTS offers advanced security features to protect your vehicles from theft and unauthorized use.
benefits.benefit3: Real-time Insights: Get instant access to critical vehicle data, enabling informed decision-making and proactive management.
benefits.benefit4: Cost Efficiency: Reduce operational costs through improved fleet management and optimized resource allocation.
benefits.benefit5: Compliance Assurance: Ensure adherence to industry regulations with comprehensive reporting and documentation capabilities.
benefits.benefit6: User-Friendly Experience: Enjoy a seamless experience with our intuitive platform designed for ease of use.

telemetrySection.title: Where Telemetry and Security Meets
telemetrySection.content: GUARDIANTS ofrece una plataforma de telemetría avanzada que proporciona monitoreo en tiempo real de la ubicación, velocidad, estado del vehículo y otros datos críticos. Nuestra tecnología de vanguardia permite a los usuarios acceder a información detallada sobre sus vehículos desde cualquier lugar, brindando una visión completa para una gestión eficiente y segura.
telemetrySection.bullet1: Controller Area Network (CAN) Integration: GUARDIANTS seamlessly integrates with your vehicle's CAN bus, allowing for comprehensive data collection and monitoring of various parameters such as engine performance, fuel levels, and more.
telemetrySection.bullet2: Geographic Information System (GIS) Mapping: Our platform utilizes GIS mapping technology to provide real-time location tracking and geofencing capabilities, ensuring you always know where your vehicles are and can set up virtual boundaries for added security.
telemetrySection.bullet3: Custom Alerts and Notifications: GUARDIANTS allows you to set up custom alerts and notifications based on specific events or conditions, such as unauthorized movement, speeding, or maintenance reminders, keeping you informed and in control at all times. Give permissions and keep a track of route patterns.

segment1.title: Natural people
segment1.description: Easily integrate GUARDIANTS with your vehicle in minutes and see your vehicle's data come to life on our user-friendly dashboard, giving you complete control and peace of mind.

segment2.title: Enterprises and Governmental entities
segment2.description: Manage your fleet's location, get a full aprobation system and integrate our system to your preexisting infraestructure for an enhanced data security and management experience.
